title: Assistant Superintendent (oversees Special Education, Preschool, Federal Programs)
notes: Jefferson County Buckeye Local (Connorville/Dillonvale). Julie Packer named Assistant Superintendent under 5-year contract (through July 2029) and explicitly oversees special ed and preschool plus federal programs. Coy Sudvary is superintendent; Susan Bachmann is administrative coordinator overseeing curriculum/afterschool. Packer is the primary ECE-relevant decision-maker. Email inferred from district domain pattern (first.last@buckeyelocal.net) — confirm before outreach. ~1,328 students.

title: Director of Elementary Teaching & Learning
notes: Franklin County district (~3,759 students). Email domain is cwls.us (confirmed by multiple staff records), not cwschools.org. Three directors in C&I: Lautenschleger (Elementary T&L — primary ECE target), Deb Finck (Secondary), Bill Whitlatch (Data/Assessment). Superintendent: Kiya Hunt.

title: Superintendent
notes: Warren County, ~1,524 students. Small district with no dedicated ECE director — listed Curriculum & Instruction dept but no public curriculum director name. District operates a 5-Star Step Up to Quality preschool inside the K-6 elementary building (opened 2020). Fischer started Aug 1, 2024 (returning to district where he was AMS principal 2004-2008). Sabina Pence is Special Ed & Curriculum Secretary; Emily Hill is Director of Special Education (covers preschool ages).

title: Superintendent
notes: Defiance County (Sherwood, OH) — operates Fairview Elementary, Middle, High (Apaches). Small district with no public ECE or curriculum director. Email not surfaced publicly; district uses centrallocal.org domain. Recommend Apollo.io lookup for keesee@centrallocal.org or similar.

title: Curriculum Consultant
notes: Wayne County (Doylestown). Superintendent: Todd Osborn. Victoria Hessey identified as Curriculum Consultant. Email inferred from district domain pattern — confirm before outreach. District office at 56 N. Portage St, Doylestown, OH 44230.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Lorain County. District migrated to clearviewschools.org domain (old clearview.k12.oh.us still listed in input). Email pattern first.last@clearviewschools.org confirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Union County-College Corner JOINT interstate district (only remaining IN/OH joint state district). Headquartered in College Corner, OH but operates under Indiana primarily; uses uc.k12.in.us domain. Superintendent Steve Jones starting 29th year; prior elementary principal in Richmond Community Schools. No dedicated ECE director found for joint district. Email inferred from district pattern.

title: Superintendent
notes: Ashtabula County. No public ECE or curriculum director. Email inferred from typical district pattern (first.last@cacsk12.org) — confirm via Apollo.io. District at 230 Gateway Ave Ste B, Conneaut, OH 44030.

title: Interim Superintendent / Director of Curriculum and Federal Programs
notes: Coshocton County. Nicholas wears two hats: Director of Curriculum & Federal Programs AND Interim Superintendent. Operates a consolidated PreK-5 elementary, so curriculum role spans early childhood directly. Strong ECE-relevant contact.

title: Director of Educational Programs (Curriculum)
notes: Ashland/Richland Counties (Olivesburg). Puster oversees curriculum for all students. Email format last.first@crestviewschools.net confirmed.

title: Superintendent
notes: Cuyahoga County. Matt Young appointed superintendent under 5-year contract starting Aug 1, 2024 (replaced Tom Evans). George Burich III is Assistant Superintendent. Small district (~825 students); no dedicated curriculum director — superintendent is the right contact.

title: Director of Curriculum (Executive Director of Curriculum and Instruction)
notes: Hamilton County (Cincinnati). Email domain is dpccsd.org. District operates Deer Park Preschool Options program (preschool listed on website). Orso recently promoted from Jr/Sr HS principal to district C&I role.

title: Superintendent
notes: Clinton County (Sabina). District moved to eastclinton.org from east-clinton.k12.oh.us. No public dedicated curriculum or ECE director — superintendent is the right contact for small rural district.

title: Director of Instructional Services / Principal & K-2 Curriculum Director
notes: Muskingum County (New Concord). Troendly is Director of Instructional Services and explicitly K-2 Curriculum Director — strong early-elementary ECE alignment. District email format {first_initial}{last}@eastmschools.org confirmed via multiple staff.

title: Director of Student Services, Curriculum & Preschool Supervisor
notes: Wood County (Pemberville). Wagoner's title EXPLICITLY includes Preschool Supervisor — ideal ECE persona. District operates preschool program. Located at 120 College Avenue, Pemberville, OH 43450.

title: Director of Curriculum
notes: Williams County. Domain is edon-nw.org (superintendent Anthony Stevens uses astevens@edon-nw.org). Email pattern first_initial+last inferred from sup's pattern. Small rural district.

title: Superintendent (former Director of Curriculum & Gifted Services)
notes: Highland County (Leesburg, ~870 students). Kesia McCoy was Director of Curriculum & Gifted Services since 2018 then promoted to Superintendent. No separate current curriculum director found publicly — she remains the de-facto curriculum lead in a small district. Strategic Path to Excellence plan referenced.

title: Early Education Coordinator (Parkview Early Education Center)
notes: Cuyahoga County. District has DEDICATED preschool/childcare building (Parkview Early Education Center) at 21620 Mastick Rd. licensed by Ohio DCY — strong ECE signal. Susan Morrison is the explicit Early Education Coordinator. Superintendent Keith Ahearn. Email format flast@fairview.k12.oh.us confirmed as primary district pattern (used 98% per Lead IQ).

title: Director of Curriculum
notes: Portage County (Mogadore/Brimfield/Suffield). Hudson previously a Curriculum Consultant at Portage County ESC, now district Director of Curriculum. (Earlier reports mentioned Emily Langille — Hudson appears to be current per Zoominfo/Rocketreach). Email format first_initial+last@fieldlocalschools.org confirmed via multiple staff.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Seneca/Hancock/Wood Counties. District at 1001 Park Avenue, Fostoria. Email inferred from common district pattern; domain alternates between fostoriaschools.org and fostoriaschools.com per third-party data.

title: Superintendent
notes: Washington County (New Matamoras, ~532 students). District migrated to frontierlocalschools.com (old flsd.k12.oh.us still in input). Caldwell new superintendent effective Aug 1, 2025 (10 yrs prior super experience). Small district, no dedicated ECE director. District has Curriculum and Testing dept; no curriculum director name surfaced.

title: Director of Curriculum and Counseling
notes: Ottawa County. Smith joined as new Director of Curriculum & Counseling in Sept 2025. District at 2810 N. Genoa Clay Center Rd. Email pattern first_initial+last@genoaschools.com (typical Ohio district format).

title: Assistant Superintendent (former Director of Curriculum and Instruction)
notes: Clermont County. Scherzinger has been in Goshen central office since 2011, formerly Director of C&I, now promoted to Assistant Superintendent. Email format last+first_initial@goshenlocalschools.org confirmed.

title: Superintendent (departing July 31, 2026)
notes: Hardin County (Dola, very small district). Cano accepted Bath Local Schools superintendency starting Aug 1, 2026; HN board is conducting search. No public ECE/curriculum director. Email inferred from district pattern. Josh Kauffman is Jr/Sr HS Principal (ext. 1206) as backup contact.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Medina County. Email format lastname@highlandschools.org confirmed on district site. Board of Education Office at 3880 Ridge Road, Medina, OH 44256.

title: Superintendent
notes: Seneca County (Bascom). District migrated to hlschool.net. White is in 5th year as superintendent. Small district with no dedicated ECE/curriculum director — superintendent is primary contact.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Academic Affairs
notes: Erie County. Lenner-McDonald is the C&I lead; district also has Director of Student Services Dayna Christopher and an Early Childhood Educator Karen Berry on staff (ECE program present). Strong fit for curriculum decision-making.

title: Superintendent / CEO
notes: iSTEM Geauga Early College High School — Ohio public charter high school (grades 9-12 only) in Painesville, Lake County. NO early childhood programs (HS-only). Included for completeness but NOT a fit for ECE outreach. Wilson previously Sped Director at RG Drage Career Tech Center.

title: Superintendent
notes: Putnam County (Fort Jennings, single K-12 building). District removed all staff emails from website for cybersecurity reasons — must call to obtain. Elementary Principal: Dawn Hedrick (ext 3200). No dedicated ECE director. Apollo.io lookup needed for email.

title: Superintendent
notes: Geauga County (Bainbridge/Auburn). Willingham started 3-year contract Aug 1, 2024 (replaced Nancy Santilli who moved to ESCWR). District uses kenstonapps.org for staff emails (per transportation@kenstonapps.org confirmation). No public curriculum director name found. Email inferred — confirm via Apollo.io.

title: Superintendent
notes: Trumbull County (Leavittsburg/Warren). Domain labrae.school. Small district; no dedicated ECE or curriculum director publicly listed — superintendent is the right contact.

title: Superintendent
notes: Putnam County. Williamson served 14 years; district was conducting superintendent search (closing Mar 23). Status of replacement unclear — recommend confirming current superintendent before outreach. Email inferred from district domain pattern. No dedicated ECE/curriculum director.

title: Superintendent
notes: Hancock County (Findlay). Otley became Superintendent Aug 1, 2023 (replaced Mark Kowalski who moved to Coshocton). District at 9050 State Route 12, Findlay, OH 45840. District-wide 'Leader in Me' curriculum. No dedicated public ECE/curriculum director — superintendent is best contact.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Warren County. Strong ECE-relevant persona (Asst Super of C&I). District serves PreK-12; Jamie Miles is Executive Director of Student Services as backup. Email pattern first.last@littlemiamischools.com confirmed.

title: Director of Curriculum and Student Services
notes: Richland County. STRONG ECE buying signal: Fraley personally championed and launched the district's first preschool this school year — early childhood is a stated strategic priority for her. Email format last.first@lucascubs.org inferred from district staff pattern.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Lake County Madison Local SD (Blue Streaks, 1956 Red Bird Rd, Madison, OH 44057). Superintendent Angela M. Smith (angela.smith@madisonschools.net confirmed pattern); Daniel J. Rambler named as next superintendent. Renee Neron listed on madisonschools.net administration page as Director of C&I. Email inferred from confirmed superintendent first.last@madisonschools.net pattern — third-party tools also list rneron@madisonrams.net which is a different Madison district. Confirm before outreach.

title: Director of Curriculum, Instruction, and Assessment
notes: Ashland County. Fulton wears multiple hats (also Athletic Director at HS and MS Principal). Adopted Open Up Resources math curriculum recently — curriculum-investment signal. Note: ad email mapletonad@imountie.org confirmed for athletics role; district-level email likely different format.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Stark County. Blair is a Milken Educator (OH '10). District at 930 17th Street N.E., Massillon. Stark County also has Early Childhood Resource Center (Angela Moses ED, regional). Email inferred as first_initial+last@massillonschools.org from district pattern.

title: Superintendent
notes: Trumbull County (~722 students). Carkido took over as superintendent Aug 1, 2025 (27 years in district, 17 as HS principal). Small district with no dedicated ECE or curriculum director publicly listed. Roberta Wilson is Supervisor of Special Education. Email inferred from district domain.

title: Secondary Curriculum Director
notes: Fayette County (Washington Court House). Boerger is Secondary C&I lead; Nicole Fatica-Mavis also listed as Curriculum Director (likely Elementary/ECE side — preferable target for PreK outreach but no public email found). Miami Trace Elementary recognized as 2024 Read Naturally School of the Year runner-up — Science of Reading alignment signal. Email pattern inferred; district has used multiple domains.
